s: Repeat this success: Architecture is document-based (skills are markdown), so new skills integrate cleanly

Repeat this success: Retention scoring provides meaningful differentiation (high-confidence + repeated = kept; low-confidence + old = evicted)

Repeat this success: Token estimation using chars/4 is accurate enough with 2x budget headroom (348 actual vs 500 objective)
